productDisplayName: Puma Men's Lifestyle Polo Mood Indigo T-shirt
description: CompositionIndigo polo t-shirt made of 100% eco-enriched cotton, has short sleeves with yoke-like stitch detailing on the torso, softly ribbed collar and cuff with mock grey lining, fabric tape detailing on inseam of the neckline,  vented hem, short buttoned placket and appliquéd brand logo in suede on the chestFittingRegularWash care Gentle machine wash in cool water Do not bleach Tumble dry at low temperature Warm iron Do not dry clean Polo neck t-shirts are a must-have in every man's wardrobe for the simple reason that they are smart, classic and versatile. This polo neck tee from puma is classy, elegant and neat. Made of pure cotton, it is comfortable and keeps sweat at bay. Pair it with chinos or jeans, depending on the occasion.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
